description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow featuring a spacious open-plan layout with multiple interconnected rooms and large glass windows. The structure includes a prominent outdoor area with a wooden deck, a large swimming pool, and several lounge spaces, as well as landscaped greenery and palm trees. The front of the bungalow is defined by a paved driveway leading to two separate garages, flanked by small garden beds and outdoor seating. The rear of the property showcases an expansive pool area with sun loungers, a hot tub, and a shaded patio. The roof is flat, with some sections covered in terracotta tiles, and the exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and light gray. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between interior and exterior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, two garages, and an expansive pool deck with landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the paved driveway, two garages, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the pool area, wooden deck, sun loungers, and rear patio with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large swimming pool, hot tub, and extensive outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Side-rear view displaying the garages, driveway, and the connection between the indoor and outdoor areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
